# CTRunStatus

**Structure**

A bitfield that represents the disposition of the run.

## Declaration

```swift
struct CTRunStatus
```

## Overview

The [doc://com.apple.coretext/documentation/CoreText/CTRunGetStatus(_:)] function passes back this bitfield to indicate the disposition of the run.

## Constants

- **rightToLeft**: The run proceeds from right to left.
- **nonMonotonic**: The run isn’t in strictly increasing or decreasing order.
- **hasNonIdentityMatrix**: The run requires a specific text matrix to be set in the current Core Graphics context for proper drawing.

## Initializers

- **init(rawValue:)**: Creates a run status structure with the specified raw value.

## Conforms To

- BitwiseCopyable
- Equatable
- ExpressibleByArrayLiteral
- OptionSet
- RawRepresentable
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
- SetAlgebra
